title: Gantt Flow — Timeline Studio
description: Plan projects on a draggable timeline — resize tasks, wire dependencies, and export your plan as PNG or JSON.
concept: A real project-planning tool disguised as a toy: drag task bars to move them, grab an edge to resize duration, link dependencies with connector arrows, and switch between Day/Week/Month zoom levels. Three starter presets (Product Launch, Website Redesign, Blank) get you going instantly, and every plan autosaves.
features: Drag-to-move and drag-to-resize task bars snapped to day granularity
Dependency linking mode — click two tasks to draw a connector arrow between them
Day / Week / Month zoom levels with month labels and a live 'today' marker
One-click PNG export (merged label + timeline canvas) and JSON plan export/import
Shareable link — full plan state encoded into the URL hash
Three starter presets plus per-task edit modal (name, category, dates, progress %)
tech: Canvas 2D (dual-canvas layout: fixed label gutter + scrollable timeline)

interaction.mouse: Drag a task bar to move it, drag its edge to resize; click Link then two bars to connect them
interaction.click: Click a task (bar or label) to open its edit panel; click the × in the sidebar to delete
interaction.touch: All drag, resize and link interactions work with touch; empty timeline space still pans natively
interaction.keyboard: Type directly into the edit modal's name/date/duration fields
